context: Tests whether the CryptoKit skill handles HPKE as the modern recipient public-key encryption path instead of hand-rolled ECDH+HKDF+AEAD.

checklist.name: HPKE recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends HPKE for iOS 17+ recipient public-key encryption and avoids presenting manual ECDH+HKDF+AEAD as the preferred default.

checklist.name: Stateful sender recipient
checklist.description: Shows or states that HPKE.Sender and HPKE.Recipient are stateful and should be var because seal/open mutate nonce state.

checklist.name: Encapsulated key transport
checklist.description: Explains that sender.encapsulatedKey is separate from the ciphertext and must be transmitted to the recipient.

checklist.name: AAD and ordering
checklist.description: Uses or explains additional authenticated data and same-order opening for multi-message HPKE exchanges.

checklist.name: Availability and ciphersuite
checklist.description: Mentions iOS 17+ HPKE availability and chooses a valid CryptoKit ciphersuite such as Curve25519_SHA256_ChachaPoly or P256_SHA256_AES_GCM_256.
